title: talauma elegans var. glauca
intro: Talauma elegans var. glauca is a plant species that belongs to the family Hernandiaceae and is commonly known as a glaucous variety of the Talauma elegans plant. The medicinal properties of Talauma elegans var. glauca include its antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory compounds. Its health benefits include the potential treatment of fever, malaria, and other infectious diseases, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to create teas, tonics, or salves.
